_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Nf2−/− SC NPCs exhibit a 2.7-fold enrichment of ErbB2 in the plasma membrane fraction (5.4-fold increase) when normalized to total ErbB2 levels in the total cell lysates (2.0-fold increase)
resourceName: Nf2-deficient spinal cord neural progenitor cells
details: Exhibited 5.4-fold enrichment of ErbB2 in plasma membrane fraction and 2.7-fold increase in ErbB2 enrichment in membrane fraction when normalized to total ErbB2 levels
